mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HOMPI ( HOMPI_URL, HOMPI_TITLE, OWNER_USER_ID, INSERT_USER_ID ) VALUES ( #{hompiURL}, #{hompiTitle}, #{ownerUserId}, #{insertUserId} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE HOMPI_URL = #{hompiURL}, HOMPI_TITLE = #{hompiTitle}, UPDATE_USER_ID = #{updateUserId}

INSERT INTO HOMPI_CONFIG ( HOMPI_ID, HOMPI_CONFIG_CODE, HOMPI_CONFIG_CONTENT, INSERT_USER_ID ) SELECT #{hompiId}, CCD.CODE_ID, #{hompiConfigContent}, #{insertUserId} FROM COMMON_CODE_DETAIL CCD WHERE CCD.CODE_KEY IN ( SELECT CODE_KEY FROM COMMON_CODE_DETAIL WHERE CODE_KEY = 'HOMPI_CONFIG_CODE' ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE HOMPI_CONFIG_CONTENT = #{hompiConfigContent}, UPDATE_USER_ID = #{updateUserId}

INSERT INTO HOMPI_MENU ( HOMPI_ID, HOMPI_MENU_CODE, AVAIL_STATUS, INSERT_USER_ID ) SELECT #{hompiId}, CCD.CODE_ID, #{availStatus}, #{insertUserId} FROM COMMON_CODE_DETAIL CCD WHERE CCD.CODE_KEY IN ( SELECT CODE_KEY FROM COMMON_CODE_DETAIL WHERE CODE_KEY = 'HOMPI_MENU_CODE' ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE AVAIL_STATUS = #{availStatus}, UPDATE_USER_ID = #{updateUserId}
mapper.select: SELECT HOMPI_ID, HOMPI_URL, HOMPI_TITLE, OWNER_USER_ID, INSERT_USER_ID, INSERT_DT, UPDATE_USER_ID, UPDATE_DT FROM HOMPI WHERE OWNER_USER_ID = #{userId}
